'''Crimsol Vaighn''' was a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who worked for the [[Mummers|Mummer terrorists]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:BTttT" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> he was the [[Chief Scientist/Legends|Chief Scientist]] of the organization and stationed in the [[Mummer bunker]], the organization's local headquarters, located near [[Theed/Legends|Theed]]. During that time, he was responsible of a violent [[Terrorist attack in Theed|terrorist attack]] in Theed. Crimsol Vaighn was killed not long after the attack, during a [[raid on the Mummer bunker]] by troopers of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] led by [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Harriet Brunser|Brunser]].<ref name="SWG:BTttT" />

==Behind the scenes==
Crimsol Vaighn appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:BTttT" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Crimsol Vaighn was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
